evidence.snippet:
Radomes Specialized for High Performance EW
============================================

Radome Specialties
Radomes Built for Demanding EW Environments
-------------------------------------------
Optimized for Minimal RF Interference

### Satellite Communications (SATCOM)

### High Power Electronic Warfare

### Hypersonics

### Surface Ships
Large surface combatants and submersible applications
### Fixed and Mobile Radar
C-UAS radars to large, fixed, and mobile arrays for long-range detection

products.name: Electro-Thermal Ice Protection
products.descriptor: Composite structures with embedded electro-thermal heaters for aircraft ice protection

evidence.snippet:
Electro-Thermal Ice Protection
==============================
[Launch Your Mission](/contact-us/ "Launch Your Mission")
Component Types
Integrating Heated Structures Within Advanced Composites
--------------------------------------------------------
High strength, reduced weight and superior corrosion-resistance
### Engine Air Inlets
### Fairings
### Main Rotor Blades
### Tail Rotor Blades
### Spinner Cones

Design
Our electrical heaters are designed to conform to simple and complex contours when embedded within composite structures, providing a seamless design that does not interfere with exterior surfaces or critical airflow areas, such as engine inlets and ducting
Our current portfolio includes helicopter main and tail rotor blades, spinner cones and fairings and engine air inlets

unresolved_questions: IFE Radomes: the abbreviation 'IFE' is not expanded anywhere in the fetched corpus; its precise meaning (e.g., a platform designation vs. In-Flight Entertainment) is undetermined from available pages.
No NDAA Section 848/889 or Blue UAS compliance claims were found in any fetched page; all products are marked unknown for both fields.

Conformal Datalink and LO Antennas, Spirals and Interferometer Arrays, High Power Horns and Notches, and High Temperature Antennas are listed as antenna specialty categories on the Next-Gen Antennas product page but have no individual sub-pages with SKU-level detail in the corpus.
